title: umbilicus vulgaris subsp. horizontalis
intro: Umbilicus vulgaris subsp. horizontalis, also known as the crevice crassula or horizontal jelly leaf, is a perennial succulent plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Umbilicus vulgaris subsp. horizontalis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
